raw_text:
Alice: Hi David, following up from our last call. Did your security team get a chance to review the questionnaire I sent over?

David: Yes, they went through everything. All good on the security front — they've signed off internally. No blockers there.

Alice: Great to hear. I also sent over the pricing for 500 users on Enterprise — that comes out to $375,000 per year. Does that work within your budget?

David: Meera reviewed the numbers and we're comfortable with $375,000. That fits within what we have allocated. I think we're ready to move to a formal proposal.

Alice: Perfect. I'll have the proposal drafted and sent by end of this week. Should I address it to you and Meera?

David: Yes, both of us and copy our procurement email. The legal entity is XYZ Air Services — make sure the proposal header reflects that exactly.

Alice: Understood. And we're still targeting Q2 close — June at the latest?

David: Correct. We need this signed by end of May so our IT team has time to prepare for June go-live.
